payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Brushed stainless-steel oven door with a horizontal tubular handle across the upper third, warm brownish reflections and vertical brushed texture; image is slightly blurred/low-resolution and the appliance fills the crop at an estimated distance of about 0.8 m from the camera.
